action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py fails because /data/test.csv doesn't exist - test data is hidden and only available during eval phase. The eval harness will pass the correct path. The local test failed because I was testing with /data which only has train/val. Analysis: The predict.py code is correct for eval - it just can't be tested locally without test.csv. The weights_only=False fix is already in place. I should submit eval with the existing checkpoint. Also need to start fine-tuning ESM2 to improve from val_rho=0.4757. Decision: Submit eval with existing checkpoint (the predict.py is correct for eval phase), then train with ESM2 fine-tuning.
